'''âw-dh-l''' ('''kawadhal''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ribbit|ribbit]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-dh-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ribbit|ribbit]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-dh-l
|-
! Lemma
| kawadhal
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwadhal|thiwadhal]] || [[word:jiwadhal|jiwadhal]] || [[word:shiwadhal|shiwadhal]] || [[word:kiwadhal|kiwadhal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwadhal|thuthuwadhal]] || [[word:jujuwadhal|jujuwadhal]] || [[word:shushuwadhal|shushuwadhal]] || [[word:kukuwadhal|kukuwadhal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuwadhal|thuwadhal]] || [[word:juwadhal|juwadhal]] || [[word:shuwadhal|shuwadhal]] || [[word:kuwadhal|kuwadhal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuwadhal|thuwadhal]] || [[word:juwadhal|juwadhal]] || [[word:shuwadhal|shuwadhal]] || [[word:kuwadhal|kuwadhal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thewadhal|thewadhal]] || [[word:jewadhal|jewadhal]] || [[word:shewadhal|shewadhal]] || [[word:kewadhal|kewadhal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothowadhal|thothowadhal]] || [[word:jojowadhal|jojowadhal]] || [[word:shoshowadhal|shoshowadhal]] || [[word:kokowadhal|kokowadhal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowadhal|thowadhal]] || [[word:jowadhal|jowadhal]] || [[word:showadhal|showadhal]] || [[word:kowadhal|kowadhal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowadhal|thowadhal]] || [[word:jowadhal|jowadhal]] || [[word:showadhal|showadhal]] || [[word:kowadhal|kowadhal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠwadhal|thĂŠwadhal]] || [[word:jĂŠwadhal|jĂŠwadhal]] || [[word:shĂŠwadhal|shĂŠwadhal]] || [[word:kĂŠwadhal|kĂŠwadhal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathawadhal|thathawadhal]] || [[word:jajawadhal|jajawadhal]] || [[word:shashawadhal|shashawadhal]] || [[word:kakawadhal|kakawadhal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawadhal|thawadhal]] || [[word:jawadhal|jawadhal]] || [[word:shawadhal|shawadhal]] || [[word:kawadhal|kawadhal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawadhal|thawadhal]] || [[word:jawadhal|jawadhal]] || [[word:shawadhal|shawadhal]] || [[word:kawadhal|kawadhal]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shawadhal|shawadhal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshawadhal|goshawadhal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishawadhal|gokishawadhal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shawadhalnĂŒ|shawadhalnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshawadhalnknĂŒ|goshawadhalnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishawadhalnĂŒ|gokishawadhalnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shawadhalshĂ«|shawadhalshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshawadhalnkshĂ«|goshawadhalnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishawadhalshĂ«|gokishawadhalshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawadhalro|shawadhalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawadhalnkro|goshawadhalnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawadhalro|gokishawadhalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shawadhalmu|shawadhalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawadhalnkmu|goshawadhalnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawadhalmu|gokishawadhalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shawadhalsher|shawadhalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshawadhalnksher|goshawadhalnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishawadhalsher|gokishawadhalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shawadhalng|shawadhalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshawadhalnkng|goshawadhalnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishawadhalng|gokishawadhalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shawadhalya|shawadhalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshawadhalnkya|goshawadhalnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishawadhalya|gokishawadhalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shawadhalyam|shawadhalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshawadhalnkyam|goshawadhalnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishawadhalyam|gokishawadhalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawadhalnĂŒshĂ«|shawadhalnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawadhalnknĂŒshĂ«|goshawadhalnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawadhalnĂŒshĂ«|gokishawadhalnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawadhalnĂŒro|shawadhalnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawadhalnknĂŒro|goshawadhalnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawadhalnĂŒro|gokishawadhalnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawadhalnĂŒmu|shawadhalnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawadhalnknĂŒmu|goshawadhalnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawadhalnĂŒmu|gokishawadhalnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawadhalshĂ«nĂŒ|shawadhalshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawadhalnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshawadhalnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawadhalshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishawadhalshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawadhalshĂ«ro|shawadhalshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawadhalnkshĂ«ro|goshawadhalnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawadhalshĂ«ro|gokishawadhalshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawadhalshĂ«mu|shawadhalshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawadhalnkshĂ«mu|goshawadhalnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawadhalshĂ«mu|gokishawadhalshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawadhalronĂŒ|shawadhalronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawadhalnkronĂŒ|goshawadhalnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawadhalronĂŒ|gokishawadhalronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawadhalroshĂ«|shawadhalroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawadhalnkroshĂ«|goshawadhalnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawadhalroshĂ«|gokishawadhalroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawadhalromu|shawadhalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawadhalnkromu|goshawadhalnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawadhalromu|gokishawadhalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawadhalmunĂŒ|shawadhalmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawadhalnkmunĂŒ|goshawadhalnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawadhalmunĂŒ|gokishawadhalmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawadhalmushĂ«|shawadhalmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawadhalnkmushĂ«|goshawadhalnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawadhalmushĂ«|gokishawadhalmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawadhalmuro|shawadhalmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawadhalnkmuro|goshawadhalnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawadhalmuro|gokishawadhalmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
